title: oncoba kraussiana
intro: Oncoba kraussiana, also known as the African boxwood or African box, is a species of flowering plant in the family Salicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oncoba kraussiana include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Oncoba kraussiana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
